title: BoatHud for 1.21 (hibi's)
body:
_It is an unofficial port. Nothing changed, just updated to 1.21. [hibi's 1.20 version](https://modrinth.com/mod/boathud)_

# hibi's description:
## Boat Hud

A Fabric mod that adds a HUD specifically for boating. Licensed under Unlicense.

![screenshot](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hibiii/BoatHud/main/.github/screenshot.png)

This HUD displays some information useful for boating such as drift angle and speed.

This mod needs [Cloth Config](https://github.com/shedaniel/cloth-config). To configure, you need [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu).
